mission.title: kudo: provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter value
mission.description: provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter value. Requested by 1+ users.

steps.title: Check current kudo deployment
steps.description:
Verify your kudo version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kudo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kudo
helm list -n kudo 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kudo installation.

steps.title: Review kudo configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kudo configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kudo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kudo
kubectl get configmap -n kudo -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kudo
```
**What would you like to be added**:
Trigger a plan based on the parameter value. 
Right now we can specify apply/delete tasks.

steps.title: Apply the fix for provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter
steps.description:
This KEP provides a way for operator developers to enable and disable features in their KUDO operators.
```yaml
tasks:
  - name: mirrormaker
    kind: Apply
    spec:
      resources:
        - mirror-maker-config.yaml
        - mirror-maker.yaml
  - name: cruise-deployment
    kind: Apply
    spec:
      resources:
        - cruise-control-config.yaml
        - cruise-control.yaml
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kudo -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kudo
kubectl get events -n kudo --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "provide a way to run a trigger a plan based on parameter" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: This KEP provides a way for operator developers to enable and disable features in their KUDO operators.
codeSnippets:
tasks:
  - name: mirrormaker
    kind: Apply
    spec:
      resources:
        - mirror-maker-config.yaml
        - mirror-maker.yaml
  - name: cruise-deployment
    kind: Apply
    spec:
      resources:
        - cruise-control-config.yaml
        - cruise-control.yaml

tasks:
  - name: cruise-control
    kind: FeatureInstall
    spec:
      value: {{ .Params.enable-cruise-control }}
      resources:
        - cruise-control.yaml

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with kudo installed or the issue environment reproducible.
